events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: open ground on a receptacle, rough-complete stage. NEC 406.4 requires grounding-type receptacles to be grounded. Open ground is a defect/non-compliance. Decision: fail. Risk: medium (shock hazard). Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 85. Value 0. Confidence high.
